questions.text: I prefer to focus on the big picture rather than details.
I am more interested in ideas than in practical applications.
I like to have a clear plan before starting a project.
I prefer to keep my options open rather than decide in advance.
I enjoy being in social gatherings and meeting new people.
I feel energized after spending time with others.
I often notice patterns and connections others miss.
I make decisions based on logic rather than feelings.
I like to imagine future possibilities.
I prefer to work in a team rather than alone.
I am drawn to abstract concepts and theories.
I like to stick to a schedule and finish tasks on time.
I trust my intuition when making decisions.
I prefer to think out loud with others.
I recharge by spending time alone.
I am more logical than emotional in my choices.
I value harmony and consider others' feelings.
I enjoy spontaneous outings more than planned ones.
I focus on facts and what can be proven.
I prefer flexibility over structure in my daily life.
I analyze problems objectively before acting.
I prefer clear criteria when evaluating options.
I like to explore many alternatives before deciding.
I am consistent and fair in my judgments.
I take deadlines seriously and plan ahead.
I like to organize my environment and tasks.
I weigh pros and cons carefully.
I rely on evidence rather than gut feeling.
I prefer concrete information over speculation.
I see symbolism and meaning in events.
